[HOOK].text: Did you know that the Lost City of Atlantis was REAL? | TEXT: DID YOU KNOW
[HOOK].visual_prompt: Archaeologist holding a map with a puzzled expression

[CURIOSITY].text: Imagine a city so advanced, it could control the oceans! | TEXT: VISIONARY
[CURIOSITY].visual_prompt: 3D rendering of Atlantis rising from the sea

[EXPLANATION].text: But what happened to this incredible civilization? | TEXT: WE DON'T KNOW
[EXPLANATION].visual_prompt: A group of people holding hands, looking up at the sky in despair

[INSIGHT].text: We can learn from their bravery and innovation! | TEXT: INNOVATE
[INSIGHT].visual_prompt: A person in a futuristic lab, surrounded by gadgets and screens

[ENDING].text: So, what secrets are waiting to be uncovered?
[ENDING].visual_prompt: A person in a diving helmet, exploring an underwater cave
